headline: BRMSTE · CARBON SETTLEMENT · ONE ADDRESS
definition: Public receive-only Bitcoin address for third parties to voluntarily settle the carbon balance of compute they consume across BRMSTE open-lane surfaces. Receive-only — funds are never programmatically moved from this address.
purpose: voluntary third-party carbon settlement for compute consumed
who_may_send: any third party — no allowlist, no account, no BRMSTE toll
sign_lane: fort-knox-edge-judgment · CURSOR NEVER SIGNS · EDGE SIGNS · JUDGMENT SIGNS
dust_policy: sub-1000-sat probe deposits never co-spent with settlement UTXOs
